emails.subject: TXU
emails.body: TXU when are you available this afternoon? can you get into your voice mail at X53913? Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: TXU
emails.body: RE: TXU cannot get into vm, but available any time this afternoon To: Kelly, Neil

emails.subject: TXU
emails.body: TXU Neil: I wasn't sure if you still had the 53913 extension. Raj Thapar wants to discuss this global settlement. Are you in the office today? Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: TXU
emails.body: RE: TXU Sara I am in today and subject to a theoretical 1 pm (never received confirmation), I am available to meet at your and Raj's convenience. My number is 54613. I believe the other number is from a prior secondment to Enron. To: Kelly, Neil

emails.subject: RE: TXU
emails.body: Neil please call me. Your extension is not 54613. Sara Raj would like to meet now. To: Shackleton, Sara
